data.title: DeFi Development Corp. to Host X Spaces Event: “DFDV March 2026 Recap & AMA + FY 2025 Earnings Breakdown”
data.description: DeFi Development Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV), based in Boca Raton, FL, revealed plans for a live X Spaces event scheduled for April 6, 2026, at 1:00 PM ET. As the first U.S. public company to focus on accumulating and compounding Solana (SOL), DFDV's treasury strategy involves the cryptocurrency. This innovative approach positions DFDV uniquely in the market. The event aims to provide insight into the company's strategies and future plans.

data.title: Stablecoin supply hits $315B in Q1 with USDC surge and USDT dip. Trading shift seen with rising bot use.
data.description: In the first quarter of this year, stablecoins were the primary choice for crypto trading as investors favored their stability. A report from CEX.io highlighted the increasing use of bots and decreasing involvement of retail investors, indicating a change in market trends. This shift was notable in the rising numbers of stablecoin transactions seen during this period, underscoring a preference for safety and reliability in the volatile crypto landscape.

data.title: VIRTUAL CARE IS HERE TO STAY: BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA'S VIRTUAL BLUE PROGRAM DELIVERS IMPROVED ACCESS, MORE AFFORDABLE HEALTH CARE, HIGH PATIENT SATISFACTION
data.description: After three years since its inception, the initiative has exceeded 150,000 participants, offering immediate access to healthcare services on the same day without any expenses for online consultations with virtual healthcare professionals. Hailing from OAKLAND, Calif., the program made its debut with a virtual-centric approach...

data.title: $75K Bitcoin rally threatened by weak US economy, credit stress, and war in Iran, with institutional holders selling.
data.description: With the US economy weakening, tensions rising due to the war in Iran, and numerous institutional BTC holders selling in the open market, the chances of Bitcoin rallying to $75,000 are being questioned. This confluence of factors has cast doubt on the cryptocurrency's potential for a significant surge in value. Investors are closely monitoring these developments as they assess the future prospects of Bitcoin amidst the current global economic and geopolitical challenges.

data.title: LSB Industries, Inc. Appoints Jonathan Ackerman as an Independent Member of the Board of Directors; Announces Retirement of Steve Packebush
data.description: LSB Industries, Inc. appointed Jonathan Z. Ackerman as an independent member of the Board, effective April 2, 2026. He will stand for direct election by shareholders for the first time at the annual meeting on May 21, 2026. Mr. Ackerman is a successful leader in infrastructure development. The company is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol LXU.

data.title: On Eve of Trial, Flying Food Group Admits to Violating Worker Rights, in Settlement of Major Labor Case Says UNITE HERE Local 11
data.description: In Los Angeles, airline caterer Flying Food Group, known for serving major airlines, has resolved a contentious case by agreeing to settle at the National Labor Relations Board. The settlement, which is considered a significant win for workers, involved the company admitting to breaching federal labor law protections. This comes following allegations of unsafe conditions and labor abuse at Flying Food Group. The resolution marks a key development in the ongoing dispute, showcasing a rare move in the labor rights realm.

data.title: NewAmsterdam Pharma Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: NewAmsterdam Pharma Company N.V. based in Naarden, the Netherlands, and Miami, has recently disclosed the approval of inducement share options by the Compensation Committee of their Board of Directors. The options cover a total of 15,000 ordinary shares of the company and were granted to two non-executive new hires. This move was made as a significant aspect of these employees' acceptance of roles within the company and aligns with the guidelines of the NewAmsterdam Pharma Company N.V. 2024 Inducement Plan and Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). NewAmsterdam specializes in developing oral, non-statin medications for individuals at risk of cardiovascular disease and with elevated LDL cholesterol levels, especially those for whom current treatments are insufficient or not well-tolerated.

data.title: Conavi Medical Announces Results from Its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: On April 2, 2026, Conavi Medical Corp. (TSXV: CNVI; OTCQB: CNVIF) revealed outcomes of its recent virtual annual general meeting held on March 31, 2026. The company, specializing in imaging technologies for minimally invasive cardiovascular procedures, shared updates post the Meeting. Additionally, amendments were approved for the Company’s Stock Option Plan during the same event.

data.title: Brazil's second-crop corn can provide a low-carbon pathway for Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF)
data.description: Recent studies indicate that scaling up ethanol production from Brazil's second crop corn could facilitate the development of sustainable aviation fuel, all while mitigating land-use changes and greenhouse gas emissions. The research findings, unveiled in São Paulo on April 2, 2026, spotlight the potential benefits of increasing ethanol production from Brazil's second crop corn for advocating sustainable aviation fuel.

data.title: FBRT Stockholders Have Rights - If You Lost Money Investing in Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. Contact Robbins LLP for Information About Recovering Your Losses
data.description: On April 2, 2026, Robbins LLP issued a reminder regarding a class action lawsuit filed for investors of Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: FBRT). The lawsuit includes individuals who bought or acquired FBRT securities between November 5, 2024, and February 11, 2026.FBRT is a real estate investment company under scrutiny for alleged misconduct during this period.

data.title: Roland DGA Announces North American Launch of VersaOBJECT LO-640-F3 UV Flatbed Printer
data.description: Roland DGA has recently introduced the latest model in its VersaOBJECT series in Irvine, California on April 2, 2026. The new addition enables quicker direct-to-object decoration. Known for its wide-format inkjet printers and printer/cutters, Roland DGA continues to innovate digital devices.

data.title: SAPPHIRE GAS SOLUTIONS ANNOUNCES STRATEGIC PARTNERSHIP WITH ANTIN INFRASTRUCTURE PARTNERS TO ACCELERATE U.S. ENERGY INFRASTRUCTURE EXPANSION
data.description: Sapphire Gas Solutions, a top distributed energy infrastructure provider, has disclosed a key partnership with Antin Infrastructure Partners, a renowned global infrastructure investment company listed on Euronext Paris. This news was reported from Conroe, Texas on April 2, 2026. The collaboration signifies a significant move in the energy sector and highlights the importance of such alliances in enhancing infrastructure development.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Gains 1,100 Points Amid Huge Recovery; Micron, Nvidia Score Big Wins (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Tuesday, the Dow Jones index saw a significant increase following President Trump's remarks regarding a potential conflict with Iran. Palantir also experienced a notable surge. The stock market today witnessed a remarkable recovery, with the Dow gaining 1,100 points. Key players like Micron and Nvidia achieved substantial victories as well. This live coverage encapsulates the day's events in the market, reflecting the positive movements and outcomes for investors.

data.title: Mattr Announces Closing of Credit Facility Extension
data.description: Toronto-based company Mattr Corp. has recently finalized an amendment to its credit facility with major financial institutions. The amendment, led by The Toronto-Dominion Bank and National Bank of Canada, along with Royal Bank of Canada, JP Morgan Chase Bank, Export Development Canada, and ATB Financial has extended the US$300 million senior secured revolving facility until October 2030.

data.title: JetBlue increases checked bag fees to $59 for one domestic flight, impacting other carriers due to rising fuel costs.
data.description: With the current charge of up to $59 for one checked bag on domestic flights, the airline is positioning itself as a potential influencer within the industry. The ongoing conflict in Iran has put strain on other carriers, making the airline's pricing strategy all the more significant.

data.title: Hershey's vows to make real chocolate after criticism, including complaints from a descendant of the Reese's creator.
data.description: After receiving numerous complaints from the grandson of the inventor of Reese’s Peanut Butter Cup and other dissatisfied consumers, a change has been implemented.

data.title: Wine, Art, Verona: Vinitaly 2026 According To Pasqua Wines
data.description: A winery in Verona is embracing innovation by incorporating artistic elements into its communication, with a diverse range of events and partnerships across the city. Located in Verona, Italy, this winery made headlines on April 2, 2026, as it revealed its role as a partner of the 2026 Verona Summer Theater festival. The winery's approach merges the language of art with its offerings, contributing to a dynamic cultural landscape in the city.

data.title: MAA Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release, Conference Call
data.description: In Germantown, Tennessee, on April 2, 2026, MAA disclosed its plans to unveil the first quarter 2026 performance figures on April 29, 2026, post market closure. A conference call is scheduled for April 30, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Central Time for further discussion. MAA is listed on NYSE under the symbol MAA.

data.title: Rafay Systems Transforms GPU Providers Into AI Factories By Empowering Them to Monetize Token-Metered Access to AI Models
data.description: Rafay Systems, a prominent infrastructure company based in Sunnyvale, California, has recently introduced advanced features in the Rafay Platform. These new capabilities are specifically designed to cater to AI factories and neocloud operators, enabling them to incorporate a metering and monetization layer. This enhancement allows for the provision of token-based AI services to both enterprises and retail users. The update was announced on April 2, 2026.

data.title: CUPE Alberta slams new library legislation as costly, unworkable, and politically motivated
data.description: A new legislation, Bill 28, has been introduced in Edmonton, AB, which has raised concerns from CUPE Alberta. The bill mandates the physical segregation of specific public library materials and requires parental permission for youths under 16 to borrow them. Applicable to all public libraries in the province, this law limits access to materials intended for adults as well. According to Minister of Public Affairs Dan Williams, books considered too "graphic" by the government will now need this added approval.
